title: Minimize Maximum Pair Sum in Array
titleCn: 数组中最大数对和的最小值

testcases.input: nums = [3,5,2,3] Output: 7 Explanation: The elements can be paired up into pairs (3,3) and (5,2). The maximum pair sum is max(3+3, 5+2) = max(6, 7) = 7.
testcases.expectedOutput: 7 Explanation: The elements can be paired up into pairs (3,3) and (5,2). The maximum pair sum is max(3+3, 5+2) = max(6, 7) = 7.

testcases.input: nums = [3,5,4,2,4,6] Output: 8 Explanation: The elements can be paired up into pairs (3,5), (4,4), and (6,2). The maximum pair sum is max(3+5, 4+4, 6+2) = max(8, 8, 8) = 8.
testcases.expectedOutput: 8 Explanation: The elements can be paired up into pairs (3,5), (4,4), and (6,2). The maximum pair sum is max(3+5, 4+4, 6+2) = max(8, 8, 8) = 8.
